message:
fix(service): panic-safe buffer and PolledAfterCompletion load balancer

Two service-layer hardening changes:

buffer.rs: Extract close_shared_buffer() helper and wrap poll_ready/call
with catch_unwind to prevent a panicking inner service from poisoning
the shared buffer. Previously, if the inner service panicked during
poll_ready, the Mutex would be poisoned and all subsequent requests
through the buffer would fail with PoisonError. Now panics are caught,
converted to ServiceError, and the buffer remains usable for other
callers.

load_balance.rs: LoadBalancedFuture now wraps its inner future in
Option<F> and returns LoadBalanceError::PolledAfterCompletion on
re-poll after completion. Also fixes the error variant naming from
NoBackends to NoReadyBackends to accurately distinguish "no backends
registered" from "backends exist but none are ready", and adds
sync_backend_count to the P2c balancer for observability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
